seoTitle: Mawson vs Melba — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mawson and Melba. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mawson and Melba.
heading: Mawson vs Melba — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mawson, Australian Capital Territory and Melba, Australian Capital Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mawson and Melba have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Mawson or Melba safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mawson has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Melba scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mawson scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Melba scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mawson or Melba?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mawson has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
